description: Reformat the chemical inventory document at /home/ga/Documents/chem_inventory_draft.docx to professional scientific standards. In the 'Compound Inventory' table, apply subscript formatting to atomic counts in chemical formulas (e.g., H2O), excluding CAS numbers and dates. In the 'Common Ionic Species' section, apply superscript formatting to charge indicators (e.g., Ca2+, Cl-). Apply the 'Heading 1' paragraph style to the section titles: 'Compound Inventory', 'Common Ionic Species in Laboratory Solutions', 'Safety Signal Word Reference', and 'Emergency Procedures Summary'. Apply bold formatting to the safety signal words 'DANGER', 'WARNING', and 'CAUTION' in the Safety Signal Word Reference section. Save the reformatted document as /home/ga/Documents/chem_inventory_formatted.docx.

section_headings: Common Ionic Species in Laboratory Solutions
